### [449] [Best-of-Both-Worlds Multi-Dueling Bandits: Unified Algorithms for Stochastic and Adversarial Preferences under Condorcet and Borda Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18972)
*S. Akash,Pratik Gajane,Jawar Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了首个适用于随机和对抗环境的"两全其美"多决斗赌博机算法，针对Condorcet和Borda两种目标，无需预先知道环境类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多决斗赌博机在排名和推荐系统中自然出现，但一个基本问题一直未解决：能否有一个算法在随机和对抗环境中都表现最优，而无需知道面对的是哪种环境？

Method: 1. 针对Condorcet设置：提出MetaDueling黑盒归约，将多路胜者反馈转换为无偏的成对信号，将任何决斗赌博机算法转换为多决斗赌博机算法。2. 针对Borda设置：提出AlgBorda算法，专门处理随机和对抗环境。

Result: 1. Condorcet设置：使用Versatile-DB实例化MetaDueling，同时实现对抗偏好的O(√KT)伪遗憾和随机偏好的实例最优O(∑_{i≠a*} logT/Δ_i)伪遗憾。2. Borda设置：AlgBorda在随机环境中实现O(K²logKT + Klog²T + ∑_{i:Δ_i^B>0} KlogKT/(Δ_i^B)²)遗憾，对抗环境中实现O(K√(TlogKT) + K^{1/3}T^{2/3}(logK)^{1/3})遗憾。

Conclusion: 首次为多决斗赌博机提供了"两全其美"算法，填补了该领域的重要空白，为随机和对抗环境提供了统一的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-dueling bandits, where a learner selects $m \geq 2$ arms per round and observes only the winner, arise naturally in many applications including ranking and recommendation systems, yet a fundamental question has remained open: can a single algorithm perform optimally in both stochastic and adversarial environments, without knowing which regime it faces? We answer this affirmatively, providing the first best-of-both-worlds algorithms for multi-dueling bandits under both Condorcet and Borda objectives. For the Condorcet setting, we propose \texttt{MetaDueling}, a black-box reduction that converts any dueling bandit algorithm into a multi-dueling bandit algorithm by transforming multi-way winner feedback into an unbiased pairwise signal. Instantiating our reduction with \texttt{Versatile-DB} yields the first best-of-both-worlds algorithm for multi-dueling bandits: it achieves $O(\sqrt{KT})$ pseudo-regret against adversarial preferences and the instance-optimal $O\!\left(\sum_{i \neq a^\star} \frac{\log T}{Δ_i}\right)$ pseudo-regret under stochastic preferences, both simultaneously and without prior knowledge of the regime. For the Borda setting, we propose \AlgBorda, a stochastic-and-adversarial algorithm that achieves $O\left(K^2 \log KT + K \log^2 T + \sum_{i: Δ_i^{\mathrm{B}} > 0} \frac{K\log KT}{(Δ_i^{\mathrm{B}})^2}\right)$ regret in stochastic environments and $O\left(K \sqrt{T \log KT} + K^{1/3} T^{2/3} (\log K)^{1/3}\right)$ regret against adversaries, again without prior knowledge of the regime. We complement our upper bounds with matching lower bounds for the Condorcet setting. For the Borda setting, our upper bounds are near-optimal with respect to the lower bounds (within a factor of $K$) and match the best-known results in the literature.

</details>


### [450] [When Differential Privacy Meets Wireless Federated Learning: An Improved Analysis for Privacy and Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19040)
*Chen Yaoling,Liang Hao,Tu Xiaotong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文对差分隐私无线联邦学习（DPWFL）进行了全面的隐私和收敛性分析，针对一般光滑非凸损失目标，明确考虑了设备选择和mini-batch采样，证明了隐私损失可以收敛到常数而非随迭代次数发散。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DPWFL研究存在两个主要问题：1) 如何精确刻画隐私损失的基础性问题尚未解决；2) 现有收敛分析要么依赖限制性的凸性假设，要么忽略了梯度裁剪的影响。需要克服这些问题，为实际应用提供更准确的理论指导。

Method: 提出对DPWFL的全面理论分析框架，针对一般光滑非凸损失目标，明确纳入设备选择和mini-batch采样机制，分析梯度裁剪的影响，建立隐私损失收敛性和算法收敛保证。

Result: 理论分析表明：1) 隐私损失可以收敛到常数而非随迭代次数发散；2) 建立了带梯度裁剪的收敛保证；3) 推导了明确的隐私-效用权衡关系。数值实验结果验证了理论发现。

Conclusion: 该研究为DPWFL提供了更准确的理论基础，解决了现有工作的局限性，为实际部署提供了隐私保护和模型性能之间的明确权衡指导。

Abstract: Differentially private wireless federated learning (DPWFL) is a promising framework for protecting sensitive user data. However, foundational questions on how to precisely characterize privacy loss remain open, and existing work is further limited by convergence analyses that rely on restrictive convexity assumptions or ignore the effect of gradient clipping. To overcome these issues, we present a comprehensive analysis of privacy and convergence for DPWFL with general smooth non-convex loss objectives. Our analysis explicitly incorporates both device selection and mini-batch sampling, and shows that the privacy loss can converge to a constant rather than diverge with the number of iterations. Moreover, we establish convergence guarantees with gradient clipping and derive an explicit privacy-utility trade-off. Numerical results validate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [451] [SHAPCA: Consistent and Interpretable Explanations for Machine Learning Models on Spectroscopy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19141)
*Mingxing Zhang,Nicola Rossberg,Simone Innocente,Katarzyna Komolibus,Rekha Gautam,Barry O'Sullivan,Luca Longo,Andrea Visentin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: SHAPCA：一个可解释的机器学习流程，结合主成分分析和SHAP方法，为光谱数据提供原始输入空间的解释，提高模型预测的可信度和一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光谱数据的高维度和强共线性给模型可解释性带来根本挑战，影响模型训练的稳定性和解释的一致性，这在临床和安全关键应用中尤其重要，因为专业人员需要理解和信任模型预测的推理过程。

Method: 提出SHAPCA流程，结合主成分分析进行降维和SHAP进行后验解释，在原始输入空间提供可解释的结果，支持全局和局部分析视角。

Result: 数值分析表明该方法能提供可解释的结果，并在不同训练运行中表现出更高的一致性，揭示了驱动模型行为的谱带和影响个体预测的实例特定特征。

Conclusion: SHAPCA为光谱数据的机器学习应用提供了一个有效的可解释性框架，有助于专业人员将预测结果与生物组分联系起来，增强模型在关键应用中的可信度。

Abstract: In recent years, machine learning models have been increasingly applied to spectroscopic datasets for chemical and biomedical analysis. For their successful adoption, particularly in clinical and safety-critical settings, professionals and researchers must be able to understand and trust the reasoning behind model predictions. However, the inherently high dimensionality and strong collinearity of spectroscopy data pose a fundamental challenge to model explainability. These properties not only complicate model training but also undermine the stability and consistency of explanations, leading to fluctuations in feature importance across repeated training runs. Feature extraction techniques have been used to reduce the input dimensionality; these new features hinder the connection between the prediction and the original signal. This study proposes SHAPCA, an explainable machine learning pipeline that combines Principal Component Analysis (for dimensionality reduction) and Shapely Additive exPlanations (for post hoc explanation) to provide explanations in the original input space, which a practitioner can interpret and link back to the biological components. The proposed framework enables analysis from both global and local perspectives, revealing the spectral bands that drive overall model behaviour as well as the instance-specific features that influence individual predictions. Numerical analysis demonstrated the interpretability of the results and greater consistency across different runs.

</details>


### [452] [Rigorous Error Certification for Neural PDE Solvers: From Empirical Residuals to Solution Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19165)
*Amartya Mukherjee,Maxwell Fitzsimmons,David C. Del Rey Fernández,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文建立了物理信息神经网络(PINNs)解空间泛化误差的理论框架，证明了当神经近似位于解空间的紧子集中时，残差误差的消失能保证收敛到真实解，并提供了确定性及概率性的收敛结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统偏微分方程不确定性量化基于离散化理论，通过网格细化控制解误差。而物理信息神经网络(PINNs)通过最小化配置点处的残差损失来近似解，引入了优化、采样、表示和过拟合等新误差源，导致解空间的泛化误差成为开放问题。

Method: 建立理论框架连接残差控制与解空间误差，证明当神经近似位于解空间的紧子集中时，残差误差的消失能保证收敛到真实解。推导确定性及概率性收敛结果，并提供经过认证的泛化边界，将残差、边界和初始误差转化为显式的解误差保证。

Result: 建立了PINNs解空间泛化误差的理论基础，提供了从残差控制到解误差的严格数学保证，为PINNs的不确定性量化提供了理论框架。

Conclusion: 该工作为物理信息神经网络的解空间泛化误差提供了首个理论框架，填补了传统离散化理论与神经网络方法之间的理论空白，为PINNs的可靠应用提供了数学基础。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification for partial differential equations is traditionally grounded in discretization theory, where solution error is controlled via mesh/grid refinement. Physics-informed neural networks fundamentally depart from this paradigm: they approximate solutions by minimizing residual losses at collocation points, introducing new sources of error arising from optimization, sampling, representation, and overfitting. As a result, the generalization error in the solution space remains an open problem.
  Our main theoretical contribution establishes generalization bounds that connect residual control to solution-space error. We prove that when neural approximations lie in a compact subset of the solution space, vanishing residual error guarantees convergence to the true solution. We derive deterministic and probabilistic convergence results and provide certified generalization bounds translating residual, boundary, and initial errors into explicit solution error guarantees.

</details>


### [453] [Robustness, Cost, and Attack-Surface Concentration in Phishing Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19204)
*Julian Allagan,Mohamed Elbakary,Zohreh Safari,Weizheng Gao,Gabrielle Morgan,Essence Morgan,Vladimir Deriglazov*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了钓鱼网站检测器在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性，提出了基于成本感知的逃避框架和三个诊断指标，发现钓鱼检测的对抗鲁棒性主要由特征经济性而非模型复杂性决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有钓鱼检测器在独立同分布评估中能达到近乎完美的准确率，但在实际部署中容易受到攻击者的特征操纵。研究旨在填补这一差距，通过成本感知的逃避框架来评估检测器在预算限制下的对抗鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了成本感知的逃避框架，建模离散、单调的特征编辑和明确的攻击者预算。引入了三个诊断指标：最小逃避成本(MEC)、逃避生存率S(B)和鲁棒性集中指数(RCI)。在UCI钓鱼网站基准上测试了逻辑回归、随机森林、梯度提升树和XGBoost等模型。

Result: 所有模型在静态评估中AUC≥0.979，但在预算限制的逃避攻击下，鲁棒性在不同架构间收敛：中位数MEC为2，80%以上的最小成本逃避集中在三个低成本表面特征上。特征限制只有在移除所有主导低成本转换时才能改善鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 钓鱼检测的对抗鲁棒性主要由特征经济性而非模型复杂性决定。如果正确检测的钓鱼实例中有正比例可以通过最小成本c_min的单个特征转换逃避，那么任何分类器都无法在不修改特征表示或成本模型的情况下提高相应的MEC分位数。

Abstract: Phishing detectors built on engineered website features attain near-perfect accuracy under i.i.d.\ evaluation, yet deployment security depends on robustness to post-deployment feature manipulation. We study this gap through a cost-aware evasion framework that models discrete, monotone feature edits under explicit attacker budgets. Three diagnostics are introduced: minimal evasion cost (MEC), the evasion survival rate $S(B)$, and the robustness concentration index (RCI).
  On the UCI Phishing Websites benchmark (11\,055 instances, 30 ternary features), Logistic Regression, Random Forests, Gradient Boosted Trees, and XGBoost all achieve $\mathrm{AUC}\ge 0.979$ under static evaluation. Under budgeted sanitization-style evasion, robustness converges across architectures: the median MEC equals 2 with full features, and over 80\% of successful minimal-cost evasions concentrate on three low-cost surface features. Feature restriction improves robustness only when it removes all dominant low-cost transitions. Under strict cost schedules, infrastructure-leaning feature sets exhibit 17-19\% infeasible mass for ensemble models, while the median MEC among evadable instances remains unchanged. We formalize this convergence: if a positive fraction of correctly detected phishing instances admit evasion through a single feature transition of minimal cost $c_{\min}$, no classifier can raise the corresponding MEC quantile above $c_{\min}$ without modifying the feature representation or cost model. Adversarial robustness in phishing detection is governed by feature economics rather than model complexity.

</details>


### [454] [Generative Replica-Exchange: A Flow-based Framework for Accelerating Replica Exchange Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18076)
*Shengjie Huang,Sijie Yang,Jianqiao Yi,Rui Zheng,Haocong Liao,Muzammal Hussain,Yaoquan Tu,Xiaoyun Lu,Yang Zhou*

Main category: q-bio.BM

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: GREX（生成式副本交换）将深度生成模型与副本交换采样结合，通过训练的正规化流按需生成高温构型，无需中间温度副本，显著提高分子模拟效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统副本交换方法需要大量中间温度副本，计算成本高昂。作者旨在通过深度生成模型消除温度阶梯，提高采样效率。

Method: 结合深度生成模型（正规化流）与副本交换框架，利用训练好的流模型按需生成高温构型，通过势能约束直接映射到目标分布，使用Metropolis交换准则保持热力学严谨性。

Result: 在三个复杂度递增的基准系统上验证了GREX，展示了其优越的效率和分子模拟的实际适用性。

Conclusion: GREX成功将生成模型集成到增强采样框架中，消除了传统副本交换的温度阶梯要求，为分子模拟提供了更高效的采样方法。

Abstract: Replica exchange (REX) is one of the most widely used enhanced sampling methodologies, yet its efficiency is limited by the requirement for a large number of intermediate temperature replicas. Here we present Generative Replica Exchange (GREX), which integrates deep generative models into the REX framework to eliminate this temperature ladder. Drawing inspiration from reservoir replica exchange (res-REX), GREX utilizes trained normalizing flows to generate high-temperature configurations on demand and map them directly to the target distribution using the potential energy as a constraint, without requiring target-temperature training data. This approach reduces production simulations to a single replica at the target temperature while maintaining thermodynamic rigor through Metropolis exchange acceptance. We validate GREX on three benchmark systems of increasing complexity, highlighting its superior efficiency and practical applicability for molecular simulations.

</details>


### [455] [Transfer Learning for Contextual Joint Assortment-Pricing under Cross-Market Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18114)
*Elynn Chen,Xi Chen,Yi Zhang*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了TJAP框架，用于多市场情境下的联合品类-定价转移学习，通过偏差感知的置信区间设计实现统计不确定性和转移偏差的分离控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多市场运营中，卖家面临数据稀缺问题。源市场数据可以加速目标市场学习，但跨市场客户偏好的差异可能导致系统性偏差。需要开发能够有效利用跨市场数据同时处理异质性的方法。

Method: 提出Transfer Joint Assortment-Pricing (TJAP)框架：1) 基于结构化效用偏移建模市场异质性；2) 采用聚合-去偏估计方法；3) 设计双半径置信区间分别捕捉统计不确定性和转移诱导偏差；4) 结合UCB风格策略。

Result: 建立了$\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{T/(1+H)} + s_0\sqrt{T})$的极小极大遗憾界，揭示了方差-偏差权衡：转移学习在共享偏好方向上加速学习，而异质成分带来不可约的适应成本。数值实验显示TJAP优于仅目标市场学习和朴素池化方法。

Conclusion: TJAP框架在利用跨市场数据加速学习的同时，能够稳健处理市场异质性，为多市场联合品类-定价问题提供了有效的偏差感知转移学习方法。

Abstract: We study transfer learning for contextual joint assortment-pricing under a multinomial logit choice model with bandit feedback. A seller operates across multiple related markets and observes only posted prices and realized purchases. While data from source markets can accelerate learning in a target market, cross-market differences in customer preferences may introduce systematic bias if pooled indiscriminately.
  We model heterogeneity through a structured utility shift, where markets share a common contextual utility structure but differ along a sparse set of latent preference coordinates. Building on this, we develop Transfer Joint Assortment-Pricing (TJAP), a bias-aware framework that combines aggregate-then-debias estimation with a UCB-style policy. TJAP constructs two-radius confidence bounds that separately capture statistical uncertainty and transfer-induced bias, uniformly over continuous prices.
  We establish matching minimax regret bounds of order $\tilde{O}\!\left(d\sqrt{\frac{T}{1+H}} + s_0\sqrt{T}\right),$revealing a transparent variance-bias tradeoff: transfer accelerates learning along shared preference directions, while heterogeneous components impose an irreducible adaptation cost. Numerical experiments corroborate the theory, showing that TJAP outperforms both target-only learning and naive pooling while remaining robust to cross-market differences.

</details>


### [456] [Learning-Augmented Algorithms for $k$-median via Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18157)
*Anish Hebbar,Rong Ge,Amit Kumar,Debmalya Panigrahi*

Main category: cs.DS

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于在线学习的学习增强算法新框架，应用于k-median聚类问题，能够匹配最佳固定解的平均性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习增强算法领域旨在利用过去问题实例的机器学习技术来指导未来实例的算法设计。当前研究需要一种能够处理序列实例并评估平均性能的框架

Method: 引入基于在线学习的新模型：给定问题实例序列，算法利用先前实例为未来实例提出解决方案。性能通过所有实例上的平均性能衡量，单个实例性能为算法解成本与最优解成本之比。将此框架应用于经典k-median聚类问题

Result: 开发了高效学习算法，能够近似匹配最佳固定k-median解在所有实例上的平均性能。实验评估显示其经验性能接近最优，并能自动适应动态变化的序列

Conclusion: 成功建立了学习增强算法的新在线学习框架，在k-median聚类问题上验证了有效性，算法能够自适应动态变化的环境

Abstract: The field of learning-augmented algorithms seeks to use ML techniques on past instances of a problem to inform an algorithm designed for a future instance. In this paper, we introduce a novel model for learning-augmented algorithms inspired by online learning. In this model, we are given a sequence of instances of a problem and the goal of the learning-augmented algorithm is to use prior instances to propose a solution to a future instance of the problem. The performance of the algorithm is measured by its average performance across all the instances, where the performance on a single instance is the ratio between the cost of the algorithm's solution and that of an optimal solution for that instance. We apply this framework to the classic $k$-median clustering problem, and give an efficient learning algorithm that can approximately match the average performance of the best fixed $k$-median solution in hindsight across all the instances. We also experimentally evaluate our algorithm and show that its empirical performance is close to optimal, and also that it automatically adapts the solution to a dynamically changing sequence.

</details>


### [457] [Starting Off on the Wrong Foot: Pitfalls in Data Preparation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18190)
*Jiayi Guo,Panyi Dong,Zhiyu Quan*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一个针对保险损失数据的数据准备框架，结合支持点进行代表性数据分割和Chatterjee相关系数进行特征筛选，集成到InsurAutoML管道中，显著提升模型鲁棒性和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 保险数据通常高度不平衡，传统随机训练-测试分割方法在处理这类数据时会产生不可靠和不稳定的结果，影响下游建模的统计有效性和可靠性。

Method: 提出新颖的数据准备框架：1) 使用支持点进行代表性数据分割，确保分区间的分布一致性；2) 使用Chatterjee相关系数进行非参数特征筛选，捕捉特征相关性和依赖结构；3) 集成缺失数据处理；4) 嵌入到自定义的InsurAutoML管道中。

Result: 在模拟数据集和学术文献常用数据集上的评估表明，该方法显著增强了模型鲁棒性和可解释性，同时大幅减少了计算资源需求，为高风险保险应用提供了可靠结果。

Conclusion: 统计严谨的数据准备方法对于保险损失建模至关重要，提出的框架为高风险保险应用提供了关键的方法升级，确保可靠结果。

Abstract: When working with real-world insurance data, practitioners often encounter challenges during the data preparation stage that can undermine the statistical validity and reliability of downstream modeling. This study illustrates that conventional data preparation procedures such as random train-test partitioning, often yield unreliable and unstable results when confronted with highly imbalanced insurance loss data. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a novel data preparation framework leveraging two recent statistical advancements: support points for representative data splitting to ensure distributional consistency across partitions, and the Chatterjee correlation coefficient for initial, non-parametric feature screening to capture feature relevance and dependence structure. We further integrate these theoretical advances into a unified, efficient framework that also incorporates missing-data handling, and embed this framework within our custom InsurAutoML pipeline. The performance of the proposed approach is evaluated using both simulated datasets and datasets often cited in the academic literature. Our findings definitively demonstrate that incorporating statistically rigorous data preparation methods not only significantly enhances model robustness and interpretability but also substantially reduces computational resource requirements across diverse insurance loss modeling tasks. This work provides a crucial methodological upgrade for achieving reliable results in high stakes insurance applications.

</details>


### [458] [HRI-SA: A Multimodal Dataset for Online Assessment of Human Situational Awareness during Remote Human-Robot Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18344)
*Hashini Senaratne,Richard Attfield,Samith Widhanapathirana,David Howard,Cecile Paris,Dana Kulic,Leimin Tian*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了HRI-SA数据集，这是首个支持人机团队合作中在线情境感知评估的公开多模态数据集，包含眼动、生理信号等数据，并展示了使用眼动特征检测感知性SA延迟的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机团队合作中，维持情境感知（SA）至关重要，但高工作负荷和动态条件下操作员常出现SA缺口。现有SA测量方法要么干扰任务流程，要么无法捕捉实时波动，缺乏支持在线SA评估的公开数据集。

Method: 创建了HRI-SA多模态数据集，包含30名参与者在搜救人机团队合作场景中的眼动、瞳孔直径、生物信号、用户交互和机器人数据。通过测量援助需求出现到解决的时间差，系统获取了感知性和理解性两种SA延迟的真实标签。

Result: 使用通用眼动特征能有效分类感知性SA延迟（召回率88.91%，F1分数67.63%），结合上下文数据融合后性能进一步提升（召回率91.51%，F1分数80.38%）。

Conclusion: 本文贡献了首个支持人机团队任务中SA系统评估的公开数据集，并证明了通用眼动特征在远程人机团队合作中连续检测感知性SA延迟的潜力。

Abstract: Maintaining situational awareness (SA) is critical in human-robot teams. Yet, under high workload and dynamic conditions, operators often experience SA gaps. Automated detection of SA gaps could provide timely assistance for operators. However, conventional SA measures either disrupt task flow or cannot capture real-time fluctuations, limiting their operational utility. To the best of our knowledge, no publicly available dataset currently supports the systematic evaluation of online human SA assessment in human-robot teaming. To advance the development of online SA assessment tools, we introduce HRI-SA, a multimodal dataset from 30 participants in a realistic search-and-rescue human-robot teaming context, incorporating eye movements, pupil diameter, biosignals, user interactions, and robot data. The experimental protocol included predefined events requiring timely operator assistance, with ground truth SA latency of two types (perceptual and comprehension) systematically obtained by measuring the time between assistance need onset and resolution. We illustrate the utility of this dataset by evaluating standard machine learning models for detecting perceptual SA latencies using generic eye-tracking features and contextual features. Results show that eye-tracking features alone effectively classified perceptual SA latency (recall=88.91%, F1=67.63%) using leave-one-group-out cross-validation, with performance improved through contextual data fusion (recall=91.51%, F1=80.38%). This paper contributes the first public dataset supporting the systematic evaluation of SA throughout a human-robot teaming mission, while also demonstrating the potential of generic eye-tracking features for continuous perceptual SA latency detection in remote human-robot teaming.

</details>


### [459] [WarPGNN: A Parametric Thermal Warpage Analysis Framework with Physics-aware Graph Neural Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18581)
*Haotian Lu,Jincong Lu,Sachin Sachdeva,Sheldon X. -D. Tan*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: WarpGNN：基于图神经网络的参数化热翘曲分析框架，用于SiP芯片封装设计，相比传统FEM方法实现200-119000倍加速，保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着SiP芯片封装和异构2.5D/3D集成技术的发展，热致翘曲成为关键可靠性问题。传统数值方法计算成本过高，限制了复杂芯片封装系统的可扩展性。

Method: 1) 将多芯片布局编码为简化传递闭包图(rTCG)；2) 使用基于GCN的编码器提取层次结构特征；3) 采用U-Net风格解码器从图特征嵌入重建翘曲图；4) 针对翘曲数据的长尾分布，开发物理信息损失函数和改进的GIN消息传递编码器。

Result: 相比2D高效FEM方法加速205.91倍，相比3D FEM方法(COMSOL)加速119766.64倍，归一化RMSE仅1.26%，翘曲值误差2.21%。相比DeepONet模型，训练时间减少3.4倍，保持相当预测精度和推理速度。在未见数据集上表现出良好迁移性，归一化RMSE达3.69%。

Conclusion: WarpGNN为芯片封装设计提供了高效准确的参数化热翘曲分析框架，支持快速翘曲感知布局探索，具有跨不同封装配置的良好迁移性。

Abstract: With the advent of system-in-package (SiP) chiplet-based design and heterogeneous 2.5D/3D integration, thermal-induced warpage has become a critical reliability concern. While conventional numerical approaches can deliver highly accurate results, they often incur prohib- itively high computational costs, limiting their scalability for complex chiplet-package systems. In this paper, we present WarPGNN, an ef- ficient and accurate parametric thermal warpage analysis framework powered by Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). By operating directly on graphs constructed from the floorplans, WarPGNN enables fast warpage-aware floorplan exploration and exhibits strong transfer- ability across diverse package configurations. Our method first en- codes multi-die floorplans into reduced Transitive Closure Graphs (rTCGs), then a Graph Convolution Network (GCN)-based encoder extracts hierarchical structural features, followed by a U-Net inspired decoder that reconstructs warpage maps from graph feature embed- dings. Furthermore, to address the long-tailed pattern of warpage data distribution, we developed a physics-informed loss and revised a message-passing encoder based on Graph Isomorphic Network (GIN) that further enhance learning performance for extreme cases and expressiveness of graph embeddings. Numerical results show that WarPGNN achieves more than 205.91x speedup compared with the 2-D efficient FEM-based method and over 119766.64x acceleration with 3-D FEM method COMSOL, respectively, while maintaining comparable accuracy at only 1.26% full-scale normalized RMSE and 2.21% warpage value error. Compared with recent DeepONet-based model, our method achieved comparable prediction accuracy and in- ference speedup with 3.4x lower training time. In addition, WarPGNN demonstrates remarkable transferability on unseen datasets with up to 3.69% normalized RMSE and similar runtime.

</details>


### [460] [Breaking Hard Isomorphism Benchmarks with DRESS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18582)
*Eduar Castrillo Velilla*

Main category: cs.DS

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: Δ-DRESS是一种图指纹方法，通过单层顶点删除在DRESS框架内实现，能唯一区分所有测试的强正则图家族，包括3-WL无法区分的经典图对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决图同构问题中的图区分挑战，特别是对于强正则图(SRGs)这类难以区分的图结构。传统方法如3-WL算法在某些图对上失效，需要更强大的图区分方法。

Method: Δ-DRESS是DRESS框架的单层顶点删除变体，通过对图进行顶点删除操作生成指纹。方法在多项式时间内运行，使用流式实现降低内存消耗。

Result: 在51,718个非同构强正则图(16个参数家族)和18个困难图家族(共51,816个图实例)上实现100%家族内区分，成功区分了3-WL无法区分的经典Rook L₂(4) vs. Shrikhande图对。

Conclusion: Δ-DRESS超越了3-WL的理论界限，为图同构问题提供了有效的多项式时间解决方案，特别适用于强正则图等难以区分的图结构。

Abstract: In this paper we study the single-deletion variant $Δ$-DRESS, part of the broader DRESS framework. We demonstrate empirically that $Δ$-DRESS, a single level of vertex deletion applied to the DRESS graph fingerprint, achieves unique fingerprints within each tested SRG parameter family across all 51,718 non-isomorphic strongly regular graphs (SRGs) considered, spanning 16 parameter families: the complete Spence collection (12 families, 43,703 graphs on up to 64 vertices) plus four additional SRG families with up to 4,466 graphs per family. Combined with 18 additional hard graph families (102 graphs including Miyazaki, Chang, Paley, Latin square, and Steiner constructions), $Δ$-DRESS achieves 100% within-family separation across 34 benchmark families covering 51,816 distinct graph instances, implicitly resolving over 576 million within-family non-isomorphic pairs. Moreover, the classical Rook $L_2(4)$ vs. Shrikhande pair, SRG(16,6,2,2), is known to be indistinguishable by the original 3-WL algorithm, yet $Δ$-DRESS separates it, proving that $Δ$-DRESS escapes the theoretical boundaries of 3-WL. The method runs in polynomial time $\mathcal{O}(n \cdot I \cdot m \cdot d_{\max})$ per graph; a streamed implementation of the combined fingerprint uses $\mathcal{O}(m + B + n)$ memory, where $B$ is the number of histogram bins, while the experiments reported here additionally retain the full deleted-subgraph multiset matrix for post-hoc analysis.

</details>


### [461] [Cyber-Resilient Digital Twins: Discriminating Attacks for Safe Critical Infrastructure Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18613)
*Mohammadhossein Homaei,Iman Khazrak,Rubén Molano,Andrés Caro,Mar Ávila*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: i-SDT：结合液压正则化预测建模、多类攻击识别和自适应弹性控制的智能自防御数字孪生系统，用于工业网络物理系统的实时网络攻击防御


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业网络物理系统面临日益增长的传感器和控制漏洞攻击威胁，现有数字孪生技术虽然能检测异常，但无法区分攻击类型且常依赖昂贵的全系统停机。需要一种能实时识别攻击类型并保持系统运行而不停机的智能防御方案。

Method: 1. 使用带可微分守恒约束的时间卷积网络（TCNs）进行液压正则化预测建模，捕捉名义动力学并提高对抗性操作的鲁棒性；2. 采用带最大均值差异（MMD）的循环残差编码器在潜在空间中分离正常操作与单阶段/多阶段攻击；3. 当攻击确认时，使用模型预测控制（MPC）结合不确定性感知的数字孪生预测来保持安全运行

Result: 在SWaT和WADI数据集上的评估显示：检测准确率显著提升，误报减少44.1%，仿真在环评估中运营成本降低56.3%，亚秒级推理延迟证实了在工厂级工作站上的实时可行性

Conclusion: i-SDT通过结合预测建模、攻击识别和自适应控制，实现了自主网络物理防御，同时保持了运营弹性，无需全系统停机，为工业网络物理系统提供了实用的实时防御解决方案

Abstract: Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems (ICPS) face growing threats from cyber-attacks that exploit sensor and control vulnerabilities. Digital Twin (DT) technology can detect anomalies via predictive modelling, but current methods cannot distinguish attack types and often rely on costly full-system shutdowns. This paper presents i-SDT (intelligent Self-Defending DT), combining hydraulically-regularized predictive modelling, multi-class attack discrimination, and adaptive resilient control. Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) with differentiable conservation constraints capture nominal dynamics and improve robustness to adversarial manipulations. A recurrent residual encoder with Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) separates normal operation from single- and multi-stage attacks in latent space. When attacks are confirmed, Model Predictive Control (MPC) uses uncertainty-aware DT predictions to keep operations safe without shutdown. Evaluation on SWaT and WADI datasets shows major gains in detection accuracy, 44.1% fewer false alarms, and 56.3% lower operational costs in simulation-in-the-loop evaluation. with sub-second inference latency confirming real-time feasibility on plant-level workstations, i-SDT advances autonomous cyber-physical defense while maintaining operational resilience.

</details>


### [462] [Model Order Reduction of Cerebrovascular Hemodynamics Using POD_Galerkin and Reservoir Computing_based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18837)
*Rahul Halder,Arash Hajisharifi,Kabir Bakhshaei,Gianluigi Rozza*

Main category: math.NA

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究脑血管系统非定常血流动力学的模型降阶策略，对比基于物理的侵入式方法和数据驱动的非侵入式方法，实现了10^2到10^3倍的计算加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑血管血流动力学模拟通常需要高计算成本的3D CFD模拟，研究旨在开发高效的降阶模型来加速模拟过程，同时保持足够的精度。

Method: 使用POD将高维CFD数据压缩到低维空间，对比两种方法：1) POD-Galerkin模型（侵入式，将Navier-Stokes方程投影到降阶基上）；2) POD-Reservoir Computing模型（非侵入式，使用循环架构学习系数的时间演化）。引入多谐波多振幅训练信号提高训练效率。

Result: 两种方法相比全阶模拟都实现了10^2到10^3倍的计算加速，能够准确预测壁面剪切应力等流动量，证明其作为高效准确替代模型的潜力。

Conclusion: POD-Galerkin和POD-Reservoir Computing都是有效的脑血管血流动力学降阶方法，为临床应用中需要快速血流动力学评估提供了可行方案。

Abstract: We investigate model order reduction (MOR) strategies for simulating unsteady hemodynamics within cerebrovascular systems, contrasting a physics-based intrusive approach with a data-driven non-intrusive framework. High-fidelity 3D Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) snapshots of an idealised basilar artery bifurcation are first compressed into a low-dimensional latent space using Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD). We evaluate the performance of a POD-Galerkin (POD-G) model, which projects the Navier-Stokes equations onto the reduced basis, against a POD-Reservoir Computing (POD-RC) model that learns the temporal evolution of coefficients through a recurrent architecture. A multi-harmonic and multi-amplitude training signal is introduced to improve training efficiency. Both methodologies achieve computational speed-ups on the order of 10^2 to 10^3 compared to full-order simulations, demonstrating their potential as efficient and accurate surrogates for predicting flow quantities such as wall shear stress.

</details>


### [463] [From ex(p) to poly: Gaussian Splatting with Polynomial Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18707)
*Joerg H. Mueller,Martin Winter,Markus Steinberger*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出一种与现有数据集兼容的3D高斯泼溅新核函数，用多项式近似+ReLU替换原始指数核，提升计算效率4-15%且不影响图像质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的各种核函数改进与现有数据集不兼容，阻碍了广泛采用。需要一种既保持兼容性又提升计算效率的新核函数。

Method: 用多项式近似结合ReLU函数替换原始指数核函数，支持更激进的高斯函数剔除，提升计算效率。

Result: 性能提升4-15%，图像质量影响可忽略。新核函数在NPU硬件上具有潜在优势。

Conclusion: 提出的兼容性核函数解决了3DGS改进与数据集不兼容的问题，在保持图像质量的同时显著提升计算效率。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have introduced various modifications to the original kernel, resulting in significant performance improvements. However, many of these kernel changes are incompatible with existing datasets optimized for the original Gaussian kernel, presenting a challenge for widespread adoption. In this work, we address this challenge by proposing an alternative kernel that maintains compatibility with existing datasets while improving computational efficiency. Specifically, we replace the original exponential kernel with a polynomial approximation combined with a ReLU function. This modification allows for more aggressive culling of Gaussians, leading to enhanced performance across different 3DGS implementations. Our results show a notable performance improvement of 4 to 15% with negligible impact on image quality. We also provide a detailed mathematical analysis of the new kernel and discuss its potential benefits for 3DGS implementations on NPU hardware.

</details>


### [464] [Precise Performance of Linear Denoisers in the Proportional Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18483)
*Reza Ghane,Danil Akhtiamov,Babak Hassibi*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 研究线性去噪器在噪声数据上的性能，提出一种通过注入不同协方差噪声训练线性去噪器的方法，优于经验维纳滤波器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在扩散模型去噪步骤的启发下，当数据协方差未知时，传统维纳滤波器无法使用，经验维纳滤波器性能有限，需要探索更优的去噪方法

Method: 通过注入与真实噪声不同协方差的合成噪声构造训练样本，用最小二乘法训练线性去噪器，在比例极限下使用凸高斯最小最大定理分析泛化误差

Result: 数值模拟显示该方法在许多场景下优于经验维纳滤波器，当样本维度比趋于无穷时接近最优维纳滤波器

Conclusion: 通过合成噪声训练线性去噪器是有效的去噪策略，在协方差未知情况下提供优于传统方法的性能

Abstract: In the present paper we study the performance of linear denoisers for noisy data of the form $\mathbf{x} + \mathbf{z}$, where $\mathbf{x} \in \mathbb{R}^d$ is the desired data with zero mean and unknown covariance $\mathbfΣ$, and $\mathbf{z} \sim \mathcal{N}(0, \mathbfΣ_{\mathbf{z}})$ is additive noise. Since the covariance $\mathbfΣ$ is not known, the standard Wiener filter cannot be employed for denoising. Instead we assume we are given samples $\mathbf{x}_1,\dots,\mathbf{x}_n \in \mathbb{R}^d$ from the true distribution. A standard approach would then be to estimate $\mathbfΣ$ from the samples and use it to construct an ``empirical" Wiener filter. However, in this paper, motivated by the denoising step in diffusion models, we take a different approach whereby we train a linear denoiser $\mathbf{W}$ from the data itself. In particular, we synthetically construct noisy samples $\hat{\mathbf{x}}_i$ of the data by injecting the samples with Gaussian noise with covariance $\mathbfΣ_1 \neq \mathbfΣ_{\mathbf{z}}$ and find the best $\mathbf{W}$ that approximates $\mathbf{W}\hat{\mathbf{x}}_i \approx \mathbf{x}_i$ in a least-squares sense. In the proportional regime $\frac{n}{d} \rightarrow κ> 1$ we use the {\it Convex Gaussian Min-Max Theorem (CGMT)} to analytically find the closed form expression for the generalization error of the denoiser obtained from this process. Using this expression one can optimize over $\mathbfΣ_1$ to find the best possible denoiser. Our numerical simulations show that our denoiser outperforms the ``empirical" Wiener filter in many scenarios and approaches the optimal Wiener filter as $κ\rightarrow\infty$.

</details>


### [465] [MST-Direct: Matching via Sinkhorn Transport for Multivariate Geostatistical Simulation with Complex Non-Linear Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18036)
*Tchalies Bachmann Schmitz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出MST-Direct算法，基于最优传输理论的Sinkhorn算法，直接匹配多元分布并保持空间相关性，用于地质变量模拟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地质统计模拟方法（如高斯Copula和LU分解）假设线性相关结构，难以保持复杂非线性依赖关系（如双峰分布、阶跃函数、异方差关系），需要新方法

Method: 基于最优传输理论，使用Sinkhorn算法直接匹配多元分布，将所有变量作为单一多维向量处理，实现全联合空间的关系匹配而非依赖成对线性关系

Result: MST-Direct算法能够保持复杂非线性依赖关系和空间相关结构，优于传统线性方法

Conclusion: MST-Direct为多元地质统计模拟提供了新方法，能够更好地处理复杂非线性依赖关系

Abstract: Multivariate geostatistical simulation requires the faithful reproduction of complex non-linear dependencies among geological variables, including bimodal distributions, step functions, and heteroscedastic relationships. Traditional methods such as the Gaussian Copula and LU Decomposition assume linear correlation structures and often fail to preserve these complex joint distribution patterns. We propose MST-Direct (Matching via Sinkhorn Transport), a novel algorithm based on Optimal Transport theory that uses the Sinkhorn algorithm to directly match multivariate distributions while preserving spatial correlation structures. The method processes all variables simultaneously as a single multidimensional vector, enabling relational matching across the full joint space rather than relying on pairwise linear dependencies.

</details>


### [466] [On Additive Gaussian Processes for Wind Farm Power Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18281)
*Simon M. Brealy,Lawrence A. Bull,Daniel S. Brennan,Pauline Beltrando,Anders Sommer,Nikolaos Dervilis,Keith Worden*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用加性高斯过程模型来分析风电场中涡轮机特定和农场级别的功率变化，旨在通过群体结构健康监测方法在相似结构间共享信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 群体结构健康监测(PBSHM)旨在在相似机器或结构之间共享信息，以提高监测效率。本文从群体层面出发，探索如何通过统计模型揭示风电场中涡轮机特定和农场级别的功率变化模式，为更明智的控制和决策提供支持。

Method: 采用加性高斯过程模型来分析收集的风电场数据集，该模型能够分离涡轮机特定效应和农场级别效应，揭示功率生成中的变化模式。

Result: 预测结果显示了风电场功率生成的模式，这些模式符合直觉认知，能够支持更明智的控制和决策制定。

Conclusion: 加性高斯过程模型能够有效揭示风电场中涡轮机特定和农场级别的功率变化，为群体结构健康监测提供了有价值的工具，有助于优化风电场运营决策。

Abstract: Population-based Structural Health Monitoring (PBSHM) aims to share information between similar machines or structures. This paper takes a population-level perspective, exploring the use of additive Gaussian processes to reveal variations in turbine-specific and farm-level power models over a collected wind farm dataset. The predictions illustrate patterns in wind farm power generation, which follow intuition and should enable more informed control and decision-making.

</details>


### [467] [Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flow for Transition Probability Density Functions of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18907)
*Riccardo Saporiti,Fabio Nobile*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flow框架，通过求解Fokker-Planck方程来近似扩散过程的转移概率密度函数，使用归一化流确保结构保持和约束满足，适用于高维PDE问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决扩散过程的转移概率密度函数近似问题，传统方法在高维情况下计算成本高，需要开发能够保持概率密度函数约束（如正定性、质量守恒）且计算高效的参数化方法。

Method: 结合归一化流和Neural Galerkin方案：1) 使用归一化流将参考过程的概率密度变换为目标密度，确保结构保持；2) 扩展Neural Galerkin方案推导归一化流参数演化的ODE系统；3) 采用自适应采样评估Fokker-Planck残差。

Result: 方法能够捕捉真实解的关键特征，保持初始数据与后续时间密度函数之间的因果关系，离线训练后在线评估成本显著低于从头求解PDE，适用于高维问题。

Conclusion: 提出的框架作为有前景的代理模型，可用于随机微分方程的多种查询问题，如贝叶斯推断、模拟和扩散桥生成，实现了计算效率与约束保持的良好平衡。

Abstract: We propose a new Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flow framework to approximate the transition probability density function of a diffusion process by solving the corresponding Fokker-Planck equation with an atomic initial distribution, parametrically with respect to the location of the initial mass. By using Normalizing Flows, we look for the solution as a transformation of the transition probability density function of a reference stochastic process, ensuring that our approximation is structure-preserving and automatically satisfies positivity and mass conservation constraints. By extending Neural Galerkin schemes to the context of Normalizing Flows, we derive a system of ODEs for the time evolution of the Normalizing Flow's parameters. Adaptive sampling routines are used to evaluate the Fokker-Planck residual in meaningful locations, which is of vital importance to address high-dimensional PDEs. Numerical results show that this strategy captures key features of the true solution and enforces the causal relationship between the initial datum and the density function at subsequent times. After completing an offline training phase, online evaluation becomes significantly more cost-effective than solving the PDE from scratch. The proposed method serves as a promising surrogate model, which could be deployed in many-query problems associated with stochastic differential equations, like Bayesian inference, simulation, and diffusion bridge generation.

</details>


### [468] [A Novel Framework using Intuitionistic Fuzzy Logic with U-Net and U-Net++ Architecture: A case Study of MRI Bain Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18042)
*Hanuman Verma,Kiho Im,Akshansh Gupta,M. Tanveer*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出IFS U-Net和IFS U-Net++，将直觉模糊逻辑集成到U-Net架构中，用于处理MRI脑图像分割中的不确定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MRI脑图像分割在神经疾病诊断中至关重要，但现有深度学习方法（如U-Net）难以处理图像中的不确定性，特别是组织模糊和边界不确定性问题

Method: 将直觉模糊逻辑集成到U-Net和U-Net++架构中，创建IFS U-Net和IFS U-Net++，使用直觉模糊表示处理输入数据的不确定性

Result: 在IBSR和OASIS两个公开MRI数据集上，使用准确率、Dice系数和IoU评估，证明所提架构能有效提升分割性能

Conclusion: 通过集成直觉模糊逻辑，提出的框架能有效处理MRI脑图像分割中的不确定性，提高分割准确性

Abstract: Accurate segmentation of brain images from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans plays a pivotal role in brain image analysis and the diagnosis of neurological disorders. Deep learning algorithms, particularly U-Net and U-Net++, are widely used for image segmentation. However, it finds difficult to deal with uncertainty in images. To address this challenge, this work integrates intuitionistic fuzzy logic into U-Net and U-Net++, propose a novel framework, named as IFS U-Net and IFS U-Net++. These models accept input data in an intuitionistic fuzzy representation to manage uncertainty arising from vague ness and imprecise data. This approach effectively handles tissue ambiguity caused by the partial volume effect and boundary uncertainties. To evaluate the effectiveness of IFS U-Net and IFS U-Net++, experiments are conducted on two publicly available MRI brain datasets: the Internet Brain Segmentation Repository (IBSR) and the Open Access Series of Imaging Studies (OASIS). Segmentation performance is quantitatively assessed using Accuracy, Dice Coefficient, and Intersection over Union (IoU). The results demonstrate that the proposed architectures consistently improve segmentation performance by effectively addressing uncertainty

</details>


### [469] [An FPGA-Based SoC Architecture with a RISC-V Controller for Energy-Efficient Temporal-Coding Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18054)
*Mohammad Javad Sekonji,Ali Mahani,Maryam Mirsadeghi,Mahdi Taheri*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于时域编码脉冲神经网络的紧凑型SoC架构，集成RISC-V控制器和事件驱动SNN核心，在FPGA上实现高效神经形态推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脉冲神经网络具有高能效和事件驱动计算特性，适合低功耗边缘AI，但在FPGA上的硬件实现面临计算量大、内存占用高和灵活性有限等挑战

Method: 设计紧凑型SoC架构，集成RISC-V控制器和事件驱动SNN核心；使用二值化权重替代乘法器为位运算；包含脉冲时间排序器处理活跃脉冲；跳过非信息事件减少计算

Result: 在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA上完全运行，权重内存减少达16倍，降低计算开销和延迟；MNIST准确率97.0%，FashionMNIST准确率88.3%

Conclusion: 该自包含设计为边缘实时神经形态推理提供了高效、可扩展的平台

Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer high energy efficiency and event-driven computation, ideal for low-power edge AI. Their hardware implementation on FPGAs, however, faces challenges due to heavy computation, large memory use, and limited flexibility. This paper proposes a compact System-on-Chip (SoC) architecture for temporal-coding SNNs, integrating a RISC-V controller with an event-driven SNN core. It replaces multipliers with bitwise operations using binarized weights, includes a spike-time sorter for active spikes, and skips noninformative events to reduce computation. The architecture runs fully on a Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA, achieving up to 16x memory reduction for weights and lowering computational overhead and latency, with 97.0% accuracy on MNIST and 88.3% on FashionMNIST. This self-contained design provides an efficient, scalable platform for real-time neuromorphic inference at the edge.

</details>


### [470] [Towards sample-optimal learning of bosonic Gaussian quantum states](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18136)
*Senrui Chen,Francesco Anna Mele,Marco Fanizza,Alfred Li,Zachary Mann,Hsin-Yuan Huang,Yanbei Chen,John Preskill*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了学习n模高斯量子态所需的最小样本复杂度，证明了高斯测量需要Ω(n³/ε²)样本，任意测量需要Ω(n²/ε²)样本，并发现非高斯测量对于被动高斯态的最优学习是必要的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续变量系统在量子计算、通信和传感中具有关键应用，其中高斯态在引力波和暗物质探测等应用中自然出现。一个基本问题是如何用尽可能少的样本表征未知的玻色高斯态，尽管已有数十年探索，但最终效率极限仍不清楚。

Method: 研究学习能量小于E的n模高斯态到ε迹距离所需的必要和充分样本数。使用信息论方法证明下界，分析高斯测量和任意测量的样本复杂度，特别关注纯态和被动态的学习，并研究单模高斯态通过非纠缠高斯测量的学习。

Result: 证明高斯测量需要Ω(n³/ε²)样本（与已知上界匹配），任意测量需要Ω(n²/ε²)样本。对于纯态或被动态，证明上界为Õ(n²/ε²)。发现高斯测量对纯高斯态学习近乎最优，但被动高斯态的最优学习需要非高斯测量。单模高斯态的非自适应方案需要Õ(E/ε²)样本，表明自适应对能量无关缩放至关重要。

Conclusion: 该工作极大地推进了玻色子体系的量子学习理论，对量子传感和基准测试应用具有实际影响。建立了高斯态迹距离与其Wigner分布总变差距离之间的锐利界限，并获得了学习任何高斯态Wigner分布到ε总变差距离的近乎紧的样本复杂度界限。

Abstract: Continuous-variable systems enable key quantum technologies in computation, communication, and sensing. Bosonic Gaussian states emerge naturally in various such applications, including gravitational-wave and dark-matter detection. A fundamental question is how to characterize an unknown bosonic Gaussian state from as few samples as possible. Despite decades-long exploration, the ultimate efficiency limit remains unclear. In this work, we study the necessary and sufficient number of copies to learn an $n$-mode Gaussian state, with energy less than $E$, to $\varepsilon$ trace distance with high probability. We prove a lower bound of $Ω(n^3/\varepsilon^2)$ for Gaussian measurements, matching the best known upper bound up to doubly-log energy dependence, and $Ω(n^2/\varepsilon^2)$ for arbitrary measurements. We further show an upper bound of $\widetilde{O}(n^2/\varepsilon^2)$ given that the Gaussian state is promised to be either pure or passive. Interestingly, while Gaussian measurements suffice for nearly optimal learning of pure Gaussian states, non-Gaussian measurements are provably required for optimal learning of passive Gaussian states. Finally, focusing on learning single-mode Gaussian states via non-entangling Gaussian measurements, we provide a nearly tight bound of $\widetildeΘ(E/\varepsilon^2)$ for any non-adaptive schemes, showing adaptivity is indispensable for nearly energy-independent scaling. As a byproduct, we establish sharp bounds on the trace distance between Gaussian states in terms of the total variation distance between their Wigner distributions, and obtain a nearly tight sample complexity bound for learning the Wigner distribution of any Gaussian state to $\varepsilon$ total variation distance. Our results greatly advance quantum learning theory in the bosonic regimes and have practical impact in quantum sensing and benchmarking applications.

</details>


### [471] [Tackling the Sign Problem in the Doped Hubbard Model with Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18205)
*Dominic Schuh,Lena Funcke,Janik Kreit,Thomas Luu,Simran Singh*

Main category: cond-mat.str-el

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于归一化流的退火方案，用于解决有限化学势下Hubbard模型的符号问题和遍历性问题，相比传统方法显著降低了统计不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有限化学势下的Hubbard模型是理解掺杂关联系统的基石，但模拟受到符号问题的严重限制。在辅助场表述中，自旋基可以缓解符号问题，但严重的遍历性问题限制了其应用。

Method: 将半填充条件下的归一化流方法扩展到有限化学势，引入了退火方案以实现遍历采样。相比电荷基中的混合蒙特卡洛方法，该方法能够更准确地再现精确对角化结果。

Result: 与最先进的混合蒙特卡洛方法相比，该方法准确再现了精确对角化结果，同时将统计不确定性降低了一个数量级，为掺杂关联系统的模拟开辟了新途径。

Conclusion: 提出的退火归一化流方法成功解决了有限化学势下Hubbard模型的符号和遍历性问题，显著提高了模拟精度和效率，为相关领域研究提供了新工具。

Abstract: The Hubbard model at finite chemical potential is a cornerstone for understanding doped correlated systems, but simulations are severely limited by the sign problem. In the auxiliary-field formulation, the spin basis mitigates the sign problem, yet severe ergodicity issues have limited its use. We extend recent advances with normalizing flows at half-filling to finite chemical potential by introducing an annealing scheme enabling ergodic sampling. Compared to state-of-the-art hybrid Monte Carlo in the charge basis, our approach accurately reproduces exact diagonalization results while reducing statistical uncertainties by an order of magnitude, opening a new path for simulations of doped correlated systems.

</details>


### [472] [On the Peril of (Even a Little) Nonstationarity in Satisficing Regret Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18514)
*Yixuan Zhang,Ruihao Zhu,Qiaomin Xie*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了非平稳K臂老虎机中的满意后悔保证，发现在L≥2个平稳段的情况下，最优后悔为Θ(L log T)，这与L=1时的常数后悔形成鲜明对比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受决策理论中"满意原则"的启发，研究非平稳多臂老虎机中的满意后悔保证，探索非平稳性对后悔界限的根本影响。

Method: 提出了一种基于Fano不等式的分析框架，通过"后交互参考"构造专门针对非平稳老虎机，扩展了经典被动估计的Fano方法和最近用于平稳老虎机的交互式Fano技术。

Result: 在L≥2个平稳段的非平稳设置中，最优后悔为Θ(L log T)，这与L=1时的常数后悔形成鲜明对比，表明即使只有少量非平稳性也会导致后悔随T增长。

Conclusion: 非平稳性对满意后悔界限有根本性影响，少量非平稳性就足以导致后悔随T增长，但在某些特殊机制下仍可能实现常数后悔。

Abstract: Motivated by the principle of satisficing in decision-making, we study satisficing regret guarantees for nonstationary $K$-armed bandits. We show that in the general realizable, piecewise-stationary setting with $L$ stationary segments, the optimal regret is $Θ(L\log T)$ as long as $L\geq 2$. This stands in sharp contrast to the case of $L=1$ (i.e., the stationary setting), where a $T$-independent $Θ(1)$ satisficing regret is achievable under realizability. In other words, the optimal regret has to scale with $T$ even if just a little nonstationarity presents. A key ingredient in our analysis is a novel Fano-based framework tailored to nonstationary bandits via a \emph{post-interaction reference} construction. This framework strictly extends the classical Fano method for passive estimation as well as recent interactive Fano techniques for stationary bandits. As a complement, we also discuss a special regime in which constant satisficing regret is again possible.

</details>


### [473] [A Theoretical Comparison of No-U-Turn Sampler Variants: Necessary and Su?cient Convergence Conditions and Mixing Time Analysis under Gaussian Targets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18640)
*Samuel Gruffaz,Kyurae Kim,Fares Guehtar,Hadrien Duval-decaix,Pacôme Trautmann*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文首次为NUTS的两个主要变体(NUTS-mul和NUTS-BPS)建立了理论收敛保证，包括几何遍历性的必要和充分条件，以及在标准高斯分布上的混合时间分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NUTS是现代贝叶斯软件库的核心采样器，但其两个主要变体(NUTS-mul使用多项采样，NUTS-BPS使用偏置渐进采样)的理论比较存在显著空白。需要建立它们的收敛性理论保证。

Method: 通过理论分析推导：1) 两个变体几何遍历性的必要条件；2) NUTS-mul几何遍历性和遍历性的充分条件；3) NUTS-BPS在标准高斯分布上的混合时间结果。

Result: NUTS-mul和NUTS-BPS在定性行为上几乎相同，几何遍历性取决于目标分布的尾部特性。但在收敛速率上存在定量差异：两者混合时间在典型高斯测度下都按O(d^{1/4})缩放，但NUTS-BPS的相关常数更小。

Conclusion: 首次为NUTS的两个主要变体建立了系统的收敛理论，填补了理论空白。虽然两者定性行为相似，但NUTS-BPS在收敛速率上具有理论优势。

Abstract: The No-U-Turn Sampler (NUTS) is the computational workhorse of modern Bayesian software libraries, yet its qualitative and quantitative convergence guarantees were established only recently. A significant gap remains in the theoretical comparison of its two main variants: NUTS-mul and NUTS-BPS, which use multinomial sampling and biased progressive sampling, respectively, for index selection. In this paper, we address this gap in three contributions. First, we derive the first necessary conditions for geometric ergodicity for both variants. Second, we establish the first sufficient conditions for geometric ergodicity and ergodicity for NUTS-mul. Third, we obtain the first mixing time result for NUTS-BPS on a standard Gaussian distribution. Our results show that NUTS-mul and NUTS-BPS exhibit nearly identical qualitative behavior, with geometric ergodicity depending on the tail properties of the target distribution. However, they differ quantitatively in their convergence rates. More precisely, when initialized in the typical set of the canonical Gaussian measure, the mixing times of both NUTS-mul and NUTS-BPS scale as $O(d^{1/4})$ up to logarithmic factors, where $d$ denotes the dimension. Nevertheless, the associated constants are strictly smaller for NUTS-BPS.

</details>


### [474] [Holter-to-Sleep: AI-Enabled Repurposing of Single-Lead ECG for Sleep Phenotyping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18714)
*Donglin Xie,Qingshuo Zhao,Jingyu Wang,Shijia Geng,Jiarui Jin,Jun Li,Rongrong Guo,Guangkun Nie,Gongzheng Tang,Yuxi Zhou,Thomas Penzel,Shenda Hong*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出基于单导联心电图的Holter-to-Sleep框架，实现睡眠表型分析和心脏表型分析的联合评估，为大规模心脏-睡眠关联研究提供可扩展方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多导睡眠监测(PSG)资源密集且不适合家庭长期监测，而单导联心电图设备已普及，能通过自主神经调节和心肺耦合编码睡眠相关生理信息，需要开发低负担、可扩展的解决方案。

Method: 开发Holter-to-Sleep框架，仅使用单导联心电图作为输入，联合支持夜间睡眠表型分析和Holter级心脏表型分析。在包含10,439项研究的四个公共队列的多中心PSG样本上进行开发和验证，并进行独立外部评估以评估跨队列泛化能力。

Result: 该框架能够在异质人群和采集条件下稳健提取具有临床意义的夜间睡眠表型，并促进心电图衍生睡眠指标与心律失常相关Holter表型之间的系统关联分析。

Conclusion: Holter-to-Sleep范式为超越传统PSG中心工作流程的低负担、家庭可部署、可扩展的心脏-睡眠监测和研究提供了实用基础。

Abstract: Sleep disturbances are tightly linked to cardiovascular risk, yet polysomnography (PSG)-the clinical reference standard-remains resource-intensive and poorly suited for multi-night, home-based, and large-scale screening. Single-lead electrocardiography (ECG), already ubiquitous in Holter and patch-based devices, enables comfortable long-term acquisition and encodes sleep-relevant physiology through autonomic modulation and cardiorespiratory coupling. Here, we present a proof-of-concept Holter-to-Sleep framework that, using single-lead ECG as the sole input, jointly supports overnight sleep phenotyping and Holter-grade cardiac phenotyping within the same recording, and further provides an explicit analytic pathway for scalable cardio-sleep association studies. The framework is developed and validated on a pooled multi-center PSG sample of 10,439 studies spanning four public cohorts, with independent external evaluation to assess cross-cohort generalizability, and additional real-world feasibility assessment using overnight patch-ECG recordings via objective-subjective consistency analysis. This integrated design enables robust extraction of clinically meaningful overnight sleep phenotypes under heterogeneous populations and acquisition conditions, and facilitates systematic linkage between ECG-derived sleep metrics and arrhythmia-related Holter phenotypes. Collectively, the Holter-to-Sleep paradigm offers a practical foundation for low-burden, home-deployable, and scalable cardio-sleep monitoring and research beyond traditional PSG-centric workflows.

</details>


### [475] [Data-driven construction of machine-learning-based interatomic potentials for gas-surface scattering dynamics: the case of NO on graphite](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18864)
*Samuel Del Fré,Gilberto A. Alou Angulo,Maurice Monnerville,Alejandro Rivero Santamaría*

Main category: physics.chem-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 开发了一种用于气体-表面散射动力学的机器学习原子间势能构建工作流，以NO-石墨散射为基准系统，结合描述符引导采样和主动学习策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原子尺度气体-表面散射模拟需要既准确又高效的势能面，传统从头算分子动力学计算成本过高，限制了大规模轨迹采样

Method: 使用SOAP描述符表征局部原子环境，通过主成分分析降维，采用最远点采样构建紧凑训练集，结合查询委员会主动学习策略优化Deep Potential模型

Result: 最终MLIP以远低于AIMD的计算成本高精度复现参考能量和力，实现了大规模NO-石墨散射模拟，揭示了吸附能、散射概率、能量损失、角分布和转动激发等细节

Conclusion: 描述符引导采样结合主动学习为构建气体-表面相互作用的MLIP提供了高效且可迁移的策略，模拟结果复现了主要实验趋势

Abstract: Accurate atomistic simulations of gas-surface scattering require potential energy surfaces that remain reliable over broad configurational and energetic ranges while retaining the efficiency needed for extensive trajectory sampling. Here, we develop a data-driven workflow for constructing a machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) tailored to gas-surface scattering dynamics, using nitric oxide (NO) scattering from highly oriented pyrolytic graphite (HOPG) as a benchmark system. Starting from an initial ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) dataset, local atomic environments are described by SOAP descriptors and analyzed in a reduced feature space obtained through principal component analysis. Farthest point sampling is then used to build a compact training set, and the resulting Deep Potential model is refined through a query-by-committee active-learning strategy using additional configurations extracted from molecular dynamics simulations over extended ranges of incident energies and surface temperatures. The final MLIP reproduces reference energies and forces with high fidelity and enables large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of NO scattering from graphite at a computational cost far below that of AIMD. The simulations provide detailed insight into adsorption energetics, trapping versus direct scattering probabilities, translational energy loss, angular distributions, and rotational excitation. Overall, the results reproduce the main experimental trends and demonstrate that descriptor-guided sampling combined with active learning offers an efficient and transferable strategy for constructing MLIPs for gas-surface interactions.

</details>


### [476] [RadioDiff-FS: Physics-Informed Manifold Alignment in Few-Shot Diffusion Models for High-Fidelity Radio Map Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18865)
*Xiucheng Wang,Zixuan Guo,Nan Cheng*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出RadioDiff-FS，一个少样本扩散框架，用于从少量高保真样本中将预训练的主路径生成器适应到多径丰富的目标域，显著提升无线电地图构建精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G网络规划需要空间连续的无线电传播特性表征，但高保真无线电地图构建面临挑战：电磁求解器计算延迟高，数据驱动模型需要大量标注数据且从简化仿真到复杂多径环境的泛化能力差。

Method: 1) 理论分解多径无线电地图为主路径分量和方向稀疏残差；2) 提出RadioDiff-FS少样本扩散框架，将预训练主路径生成器适应到多径丰富目标域；3) 引入方向一致性损失约束扩散分数更新沿物理合理的传播方向，抑制低数据量下的相位不一致伪影。

Result: 相比原始扩散基线，RadioDiff-FS在静态无线电地图上降低NMSE 59.5%，在动态无线电地图上降低74.0%，在严格有限监督下达到SSIM 0.9752和PSNR 36.37 dB。

Conclusion: RadioDiff-FS通过理论分解和方向一致性损失，有效解决了少样本条件下无线电地图构建的跨域适应问题，显著提升了生成质量和计算效率。

Abstract: Radio maps (RMs) provide spatially continuous propagation characterizations essential for 6G network planning, but high-fidelity RM construction remains challenging. Rigorous electromagnetic solvers incur prohibitive computational latency, while data-driven models demand massive labeled datasets and generalize poorly from simplified simulations to complex multipath environments. This paper proposes RadioDiff-FS, a few-shot diffusion framework that adapts a pre-trained main-path generator to multipath-rich target domains with only a small number of high-fidelity samples. The adaptation is grounded in a theoretical decomposition of the multipath RM into a dominant main-path component and a directionally sparse residual. This decomposition shows that the cross-domain shift corresponds to a bounded and geometrically structured feature translation rather than an arbitrary distribution change. A Direction-Consistency Loss (DCL) is then introduced to constrain diffusion score updates along physically plausible propagation directions, suppressing phase-inconsistent artifacts that arise in the low-data regime. Experiments show that RadioDiff-FS reduces NMSE by 59.5% on static RMs and by 74.0% on dynamic RMs relative to the vanilla diffusion baseline, achieving an SSIM of 0.9752 and a PSNR of 36.37 dB under severely limited supervision.

</details>
